title: poa arctica var. grayana
intro: Poa arctica var. grayana, also known as Arctic bluegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Arctic tundra and mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Poa arctica var. grayana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
